title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF BINANWAAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF IGBARAS, PROVINCE OF ILOILO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4379 / 57 OG No. 13, 2294 (March 27, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2901, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF BINANWAAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF IGBARAS, PROVINCE OF ILOILO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Binanwa-an in the Municipality of Igbaras, Province of Iloilo, is converted into a barrio of said municipality, to be known as the barrio of Binanwa-an.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
